title: helichrysum lucidum var. normalis
intro: Helichrysum lucidum var. normalis, also known as the Everlast plant or Immortelle, is a perennial flowering plant within the daisy family that is native to the Mediterranean region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, reducing pain and swelling, and preventing infections. The plant is rich in flavonoids, saponins, and essential oils, contributing to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving skin health, and supporting immune function. Helichrysum lucidum var. normalis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including essential oil, tincture, and salve, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
